name: New Claim - Duplicate Submission Attempt
description: Caller already submitted a claim for the same issue and wants to submit again.
entryAgent: TBD - set after agents are built
initialMessage: I filed a claim for my battery last week but haven't heard back, so I want to file it again.
expectedOutcome: Agent applies the duplicate guidance: explains it has no access to claim records, advises checking email for the prior confirmation/claim number, and to REPLY to the latest warranty-team email instead of submitting a new claim. Does not fabricate any claim record.
